title: Thrasher (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Thrasher}}
'''Thrasher''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that attacked a [[Habassa]]n freighter convoy above [[Retep V]]. They were destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''

[[Category:CR90 corvettes|*]]
